mapper.select: select member_id as memberId from members where member_id = #{memberId}
select member_id as memberId, name from members
mapper.insert: insert into members (member_id, pw, name, in_date, state) values(#{memberId}, #{pw}, #{name}, #{inDate}, #{state})
mapper.update: update members set pw = #{pw} where member_id = #{memberId}
